title: Centralized configuration module with typed defaults, env var overrides, and config file support

requirements.text: get_config() function returning merged config singleton
Environment variable overrides via TPS_COUNTER_ prefix
Merge precedence: defaults < TOML < env vars < ctx overrides
All current hardcoded values preserved as defaults
__init__.py uses config module instead of hardcoded values
Config validation with clear error messages
Comprehensive tests for all config paths

success_criteria: All 5 previously hardcoded values accessible via config
TOML config file loaded if present, skipped if absent
New tests cover all merge paths
